_comment: Plot projects / jobs bigger than a single planting. status: idea | planned | in-progress | done. areaId links to an area in areas.json (optional).

projects.title: Finish the polytunnel
projects.summary: Frame is up; needs its cover (skin) fitting.
projects.next: Order/measure the cover and fit it on a still, warm day.

projects.title: Improve the compost setup
projects.summary: Make the compost heap tidier and more productive.
projects.next: Build/define bays and start layering greens and browns.

projects.title: Better tool storage
projects.summary: The tool box at the bottom of the rough ground needs upgrading.
projects.next: Decide on a small store/shed or a weatherproof box.

projects.title: Install a bench
projects.summary: A spot to sit, lower-left near the (dying) peach tree.
projects.next: Clear the area and level a base.

projects.title: Clear the bramble & weeds
projects.summary: ~2m is overrun; reclaim it for growing space.
projects.next: Sheet-mulch through the season, then dig out roots.

projects.title: Plant the flower area
projects.next: Pick a pollinator-friendly mix and sow in spring.
